english: What is the difference between a set and a subset in set theory, and provide an example using Indian states
hindi: सेट थ्योरी में सेट और सबसेट में क्या अंतर है और भारतीय राज्यों का उदाहरण देकर समझाएं
tamil: தொகுப்புக் கோட்பாட்டில் ஒரு தொகுப்பு மற்றும் ஒரு துணைத்தொகுப்பு இடையே உள்ள வேறுபாடு என்ன மற்றும் இந்திய மாநிலங்களைப் பயன்படுத்தி ஒரு எடுத்துக்காட்டை வழங்குங்கள்
vietnamese: Sự khác biệt giữa một tập hợp và một tập con trong lý thuyết tập hợp là gì và đưa ra một ví dụ sử dụng các bang của Ấn Độ
correct_answer: A set is an unordered collection of unique elements, while a subset is a set whose elements are all members of another set. For example, the set of Indian states is a subset of the set of all countries in South Asia
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing a definition of set and subset that is too vague or by failing to provide a relevant example, or by providing a factually incorrect example
